channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: DA and ANC Coalition Mayors: A Step Forward for Joburg's Recovery
item.description: The election of Loyiso Masuku as deputy mayor of Joburg marks a significant moment for the city's leadership. This decision, alongside DA leader Helen Zille's bid for the position of mayor, presents a...

item.title: Traffic chaos on II Chundrigar Road due to city-wide closures
item.description: Karachi's II Chundrigar Road is facing severe traffic congestion as key city roads, MT Khan Road and Mai Kolachi Road, remain closed for security reasons. The closures come in the aftermath of protest...

item.title: The Impact of Global Tensions on Oil Prices and Supply Chains
item.description: The ongoing conflict between Iran, the US, and Israel has resulted in disruptions to one of the most important oil shipping routes in the world: the Strait of Hormuz. This vital maritime corridor, whi...

item.title: Six Osun Reps Move From PDP to Accord Party Amid Political Shift
item.description: Six members of the House of Representatives from Osun State have announced their defection from the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) to the Accord Party. The lawmakers made their decision public during ...

item.title: U.S. and Israel Conduct Military Strikes in Beirut and Tehran Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: Tensions in the Middle East have escalated as the United States and Israel launch a series of military strikes on Iran and Lebanon. Israeli airstrikes targeted Hezbollah command centres and weapons st...

item.title: Leaked Liberal Party review highlights leadership issues and declining voter support
item.description: A leaked internal review of the Liberal Party’s 2025 federal election campaign has painted a stark picture of organisational dysfunction and leadership problems. Conducted by former federal minister N...

item.title: Leaders Unite in Mourning After Fatal Helicopter Crash Claims MP Johana Ng'eno
item.description: Leaders from both the National Assembly and the Senate have come together to mourn the late Emurua Dikirr MP, Johana Ng'eno, who tragically lost his life in a helicopter crash in Nandi County. The del...

item.title: Sanwo-Olu to celebrate Lagos students' success at World School Games and African Youth Games
item.description: Governor Babajide Sanwo-Olu of Lagos State is set to honour student athletes from Lagos who made remarkable achievements at the 2026 World School Games in Doha, Qatar. These students competed in athle...

item.title: PM Urges Continued Education on Land Management and Conflict Resolution in Tanzania
item.description: Prime Minister Dr. Mwigulu Nchemba of Tanzania has called on Members of Parliament and local leaders in Mbulu to engage with citizens on land issues. Addressing residents at Haydom Lutheran Hospital, ...

item.title: Understanding How Injustice Affects Africa’s Growth
item.description: Di article explains how systemic injustices dey undermine di dream for Africa wey dey prosper. The writer point out say justice na di cornerstone for any society wey wan work well. Even though African...

item.title: MQM-P demands new province in Sindh citing constitutional rights
item.description: KARACHI: The Muttahida Qaumi Movement–Pakistan (MQM-P) has renewed its call for the creation of a new province in Sindh, stressing that if parliament and courts fail to provide justice, the party will...

item.title: Met Police Commissioner Acknowledges Challenges in Rebuilding Women's Trust
item.description: The Commissioner of the Metropolitan Police, Sir Mark Rowley, has acknowledged the ongoing trust issues between women and the force, speaking on the fifth anniversary of Sarah Everard's murder. He rec...

item.title: Alex Glenn addresses response to social media post, denies disrespecting coach
item.description: Alex Glenn, former Brisbane Broncos player and current club employee, has clarified his response to a recent social media post that drew public attention. The post sparked speculation that Glenn had s...

item.title: Starmer and Trump clash over Iran and UK support for US military actions
item.description: Keir Starmer, the leader of the Labour Party, has clashed with US President Donald Trump over the ongoing conflict between the US, Israel, and Iran. In the UK House of Commons, Starmer made it clear t...

item.title: Chancellor Rachel Reeves Presents Spring Economic Update in Commons
item.description: Chancellor Rachel Reeves is set to deliver her spring economic statement to the House of Commons, emphasizing that her policies have strengthened the UK's economy. Speaking amid global uncertainty, in...

item.title: Former Health Secretary Dr. Alran Bengzon Passes Away at 90, Leaving a Lasting Legacy in Philippine Healthcare
item.description: Dr. Alfredo 'Alran' Bengzon, former Health Secretary during the Cory Aquino administration, has passed away at the age of 90. He was known for his groundbreaking efforts to make medicines more afforda...

item.title: Kenya Reports 5,009 Road Fatalities, Leaders Call for National E-Traffic Integration
item.description: A recent report by the National Council on the Administration of Justice (NCAJ) shows that Kenya recorded 5,009 road deaths, a rise of 261 from 2024, highlighting an increasing road safety crisis. Chi...

item.title: Imran Khan and Bushra Bibi Get Bail in Toshakhana Fake Receipt Case
item.description: In a significant ruling, an Islamabad court has granted bail to Imran Khan, the founder of Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI), and his wife Bushra Bibi in the case concerning a fake receipt allegedly used...

item.title: Canadian Defence Minister Comments on Iran’s Khamenei and Ottawa’s Position on Air Strikes
item.description: Defence Minister David McGuinty labelled Iran’s late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei as 'a force for evil' while defending Canada’s endorsement of recent U.S. and Israeli air strikes on Iran. Th...

item.title: Sonia Gandhi Criticises Centre for Silence on Khamenei’s Death Amid Iran-Israel Tensions
item.description: Congress leader Sonia Gandhi has strongly criticised the Indian government over its silence following the death of Iran's Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. She said that the Centre's lack of com...
